issues.objection: The verse claims multi-life knowledge (vyatītāni janmāni); the analog claims multi-stack experience. The STRETCHED tag explicitly acknowledges the gap. The Sanskrit-side concern: the verse is metaphysically larger and the engineering layer says so. Honest scoping; minor caveat for surface flattening of vyatīta-janma to multi-decade career.

notes: STRETCHED tag honestly applied. The verse's claim (multi-life knowledge) is preserved at source-pack level. The engineering analog's smaller claim (multi-stack empirical knowledge) is explicitly disavowed of the metaphysical scope. PASS_WITH_CAVEAT counted as PASS for scoring per project convention.
